block.header: mukwonoura no iriye no sudori pagukumoru kimi wo panarete kwopwi ni sinu besi
opobune ni imo noru mono ni aramaseba pagukumimotite yukamasi monowo
kimi ga yuku umibye no yado ni kwiri tataba a ga tatinageku iki to sirimase
aki saraba apimimu monowo nani si ka mo kwiri ni tatu beku nageki si masamu
opobune wo arumi ni idasi imasu kimi tutumu koto naku paya kapyerimase
masakikute imo ga ipapaba oki tu nami tipye ni tatu tomo sapari arame ya mo
wakarenaba uraganasikyemu a ga koromo sita ni wo kimase tadani apu madeni
wagimokwo ga sita ni mo kiyo to okuritaru koromo no pimo wo are tokame ya mo
wa ga yuwe ni omopi na yase so akikaze no pukamu so no tukwi apamu monoyuwe
takubusuma sirakwi pye imasu kimi ga me wo kyepu ka asu ka to ipapite matamu
paroparoni omopoyuru kamo sikaredomo kyesiki kokoro wo a ga mopanaku ni
yupu saraba pigurasi kinaku ikwomayama kwoyete so a ga kuru imo ga me wo pori
imo ni apazu araba subye nami ipane pumu ikwoma no yama wo kwoyete so a ga kuru
imo to arisi toki pa aredomo wakarete pa koromode samuki mono ni so arikyeru
unapara ni ukine semu ywo pa oki tu kaze itaku na puki so imo mo aranaku ni

sentence.transcription: uki ne se mu ywo pa

block.header: opotomonomitu ni punanori kogiidete pa idure no sima ni ipori semu ware
sipo matu to arikyeru pune wo sirazusite kuyasiku imo wo wakarekinikyeri
asabiraki kogidete kureba mukwonoura no sipopwi no kata ni tadu ga kowe su mo
wagimokwo ga katami ni mimu wo inamituma siranami takami yoso ni ka mo mimu

sentence.transcription: yoso ni ka mo mi mu

block.header: watatumi no oki tu siranami tatiku rasi amawotomyedomo simagakuru miyu
nubatamano ywo pa akenu rasi tamanoura ni asari suru tadu nakiwataru nari
tukuyomi no pikari wo kiywomi kamwisima no iswomwi no ura yu punade su ware pa
panareswo ni tateru murwonokwi utagatamo pisasiki toki wo sugwinikyeru kamo
simasiku mo pitori ariuru mono ni are ya sima no murwonokwi panarete aru ramu
awoniyosi naranomiyakwo ni tanabikyeru ama no sirakumo miredo akanu kamo
awoyagwi no yeda kiriorosi yutane maki yuyusiki kimi ni kwopwiwataru kamo
imo ga swode wakarete pisani narinuredo pitopi mo imo wo wasurete omope ya
watatumi no umi ni idetaru sikamagapa tayemu pi ni koso a ga kwopwiyamame
tamamo karu wotomye wo sugwite natukusano nwosimagasaki ni ipori su ware pa
tamamo karu minume wo sugwite natukusano nwosimagasaki ni pune tikadukinu
sirwotapeno pudiyenoura ni izari suru ama to ya mi ramu tabi yuku ware wo
aratape no pudiyenoura ni suzuki turu ama to ka mi ramu tabi yuku ware wo
amazakaru pina no nagadi wo kwopwikureba akasinotwo ywori ipye no atari miyu
amazakaru pina no nagadi wo kwopwikureba akasinotwo ywori yamatosima miyu
mukwonoumi no nipa yoku a rasi izari suru ama no turibune nami no upe yu miyu

sentence.transcription: nami no upe yu mi yu

block.header: kepi no umi no nipa yoku a rasi karikomono midarete idu miyu ama no turibune
agwo no ura ni punanori su ramu wotomyera ga akamo no suswo ni sipo mitu ramu ka
aminoura punanori su ramu wotomyera ga tamamo no suswo ni sipo mitu ramu ka
opobune ni makadi sizinuki unapara wo kogidete wataru tukwipitowotokwo
awoniyosi naranomiyakwo ni yuku pito moga mo kusamakura tabi yuku pune no tomari tugemu ni
unapara wo yaswosimagakuri kinuredomo naranomiyakwo pa wasurekanetu mo
kapyerusa ni imo ni misemu ni watatumi no oki tu siratama piripite yukana

sentence.transcription: imo ni mi se mu ni

block.header: wa ga yuwe ni imo nageku rasi kazapaya no ura no okipye ni kwiri tanabikyeri
oki tu kaze itaku pukiseba wagimokwo ga nageki no kwiri ni akamasi monowo
ipabasiru tagi mo todoroni naku semi no kowe wo si kikeba miyakwo si omopoyu
yamagapa no kiywoki kapase ni aswobedomo naranomiyakwo pa wasurekanetu mo
iswo no ma yu tagitu yamagapa tayezu araba mata mo apimimu aki katamakete
kwopwi sigemi nagusamekanete pigurasi no naku simakage ni ipori suru kamo
wa ga inoti wo nagatwo no sima no kwomatubara ikuyo wo pete ka kamusabwiwataru
tukuyomi no pikari wo kiywomi yupunagi ni kakwo no kowe ywobi uramwi kogu kamo
yama no pa ni tukwi katabukeba izari suru ama no tomosibwi oki ni nadusapu
ware nomwi ya ywopune pa kogu to omopyereba okipye no kata ni kadi no oto su nari

yupu sareba asibye ni sawaki akekureba oki ni nadusapu kamo sura mo tuma to tagupite wa ga wo ni pa simo na puri so to sirwotapeno pane sasikapete utiparapi sane to pu monowo yuku midu no kapyeranu gotoku puku kaze no miyenu ga gotoku atwo mo naki yo no pito nisite wakarenisi imo ga kisetesi naregoromo swode katasikite pitori ka mo nemu

sentence.transcription: mi ye nu ga goto ku
pito ri ka mo ne mu

block.header: tadu ga naki asibye wo sasite tobiwataru ana tadutadusi pitori sanureba

asa sareba imo ga te ni maku kagami nasu mitu no pamabwi ni opobune ni makadi sizinuki karakuni ni watariyukamu to tadamukapu minume wo sasite sipo matite miwobiki yukeba okipye ni pa siranami takami uramwi ywori kogite watareba wagimokwoni apadinosima pa yupu sareba kumowikakurinu saywo pukete yuku pye wo sirani agakokoro akasinoura ni pune tomete ukine wo situtu watatumi no okipye wo mireba izari suru ama no wotomye pa wobune nori turarani ukyeri akatoki no sipo mitikureba asibye ni pa tadu nakiwataru asanagi ni punade wo semu to punabito mo kakwo mo kowe ywobi nipodorino nadusapiyukeba ipyesima pa kumowi ni miyenu a ga mopyeru kokoro nagu ya to payaku kite mimu to omopite opobune wo kogi wa ga yukeba oki tu nami takaku tatikinu yoso nomwi ni mitutu sugwiyuki tamanoura ni pune wo todomete pamabwi ywori uraiswo wo mitutu nakukwonasu ne nomwi si nakayu watatumi no tamaki no tama wo ipyedutwo ni imo ni yaramu to piripitori swode ni pa irete kapyesiyaru tukapi nakyereba moteredomo sirusi wo namito mata okituru kamo

sentence.transcription: mi tu no pama bwi ni
puna de wo se mu to
kumo wi ni mi ye nu

block.header: tamanoura no oki tu siratama piripyeredo mata so okituru miru pito wo nami

sentence.transcription: mi ru pito wo na mi

block.header: aki saraba wa ga pune patemu wasuregapi yosekite okyere oki tu siranami
makadi nuki pune si yukazupa miredo akanu maripunoura ni yadori semasi wo
itusikamo mimu to omopisi apasima wo yoso ni ya kwopwimu yuku yosi wo nami
opopune ni kasi puritatete pamagiywoki maripunoura ni yadori ka semasi
apasimano apazi to omopu imo ni are ya yasui mo nezute a ga kwopwiwataru
tukusidi no kadanooposima simasiku mo mineba kwopwisiki imo wo okite kinu
imo ga ipyedi tikaku ariseba miredo akanu maripunoura wo misemasi monowo
ipyebito pa kapyeri paya ko to ipapisima ipapi matu ramu tabi yuku ware wo
kusamakura tabi yuku pito wo ipapisima ikuyo puru made ipapikinikyemu
kore ya ko no na ni opu narutwo no udusipo ni tamamo karu to pu amawotomyedomo
nami no upe ni ukine sesi ywopi ado mope ka kokoroganasiku ime ni miyeturu
miyakwopye ni yukamu pune moga karikomono midarete omopu koto tugeyaramu
akatoki no ipyegwopwisiki ni uramwi ywori kadi no oto suru pa amawotomye kamo
okipye ywori sipo mitiku rasi kara no ura ni asari suru tadu nakite sawakinu
okipye ywori punabito noboru ywobiyosete iza tugeyaramu tabi no yadori wo
okipye ywori punabito noboru ywobiyosete tabi no yadori wo iza tugeyarana
opokimi no mikoto kasikwomi opobune no yuki no manima ni yadori suru kamo
wagimokwo pa paya mo konu ka to matu ramu wo oki ni yasumamu ipyetukazusite

sentence.transcription: paya mo ko nu ka to

block.header: uramwi ywori kogikosi pune wo kaze payami oki tu miura ni yadori suru kamo
wagimokwo ga ikani omope ka nubatamano pitoywo mo otizu ime ni si miyuru
unapara no okipye ni tomosi izaru pwi pa akasite tomose yamatosima mimu
kamozimono ukine wo sureba minanowata kaguroki kami ni tuyu so okinikyeru
pisakatano amateru tukwi pa mituredomo a ga mopu imo ni apanu koro kamo
nubatamano ywo wataru tukwi pa paya mo idenu kamo unapara no yaswosima no upe yu imo ga atari mimu

sentence.transcription: ya swo sima no upe yu

block.header: sika no ama no pitopi mo otizu yaku sipo no karaki kwopwi wo mo are pa suru kamo
sikanoura ni izari suru ama ipyebito no matikwopu ramu ni akasituru uwo
kasipuye ni tadu nakiwataru sikanoura ni oki tu siranami tati si ku rasi mo
kasipuye ni tadu nakiwataru sikanoura ni oki tu siranami miti si kinu rasi
ima ywori pa akidukinu rasi asipikwino yamamatukage ni pigurasi nakinu
akipagwi ni nipopyeru wa ga mo nurenu tomo kimi ga mipune no tuna si toriteba
tosi ni arite pitoywo imo ni apu pikwoposi mo ware ni masarite omopu rame ya mo
yupudukuywo kage tatiyoriapi ama no gapa kogu punabito wo miru ga tomosisa
akikaze pa pinikyeni pukinu wagimokwo pa itu to ka ware wo ipapimatu ramu
kamusaburu aratu no saki ni yosuru nami manaku ya imo ni kwopwiwatarinamu

sentence.transcription: ma na ku ya imo ni

block.header: kaze no muta yosekuru nami ni izari suru amawotomyera ga mo no suswo nurenu
kaze no muta yosekuru nami ni izari suru ama no wotomye ga mo no suswo nurenu
ama no para purisakemireba ywo zo pukenikyeru yosiweyasi pitori nuru ywo pa akeba akenu tomo
watatumi no oki tu napanori kuru toki to imo ga matu ramu tukwi pa penitutu
sikanoura ni izari suru ama akekureba uramwi kogu rasi kadi no oto kikoyu
imo wo omopi i no nerayenu ni akatoki no asa kwirigomori karigane zo naku
yupu sareba akikaze samusi wagimokwo ga tokiarapigoromo yukite paya kimu
wa ga tabi pa pisasiku a rasi ko no a ga kyeru imo ga koromo no akaduku mireba

sentence.transcription: ko no a ga k yeru

block.header: opokimi no topono mikadwo to omopyeredo ke nagaku si areba kwopwinikyeru kamo
tabi ni aredo yworu pa pwi tomosi woru ware wo yamwi ni ya imo ga kwopwitutu aru ramu
karatomari noko no uranami tatanu pi pa aredomo ipye ni kwopwinu pi pa nasi

sentence.transcription: kwopwi nu pi pa na si

block.header: nubatamano ywo wataru tukwi ni aramaseba ipye n aru imo ni apite komasi wo
pisakatano tukwi pa teritari itwoma naku ama no izari pa tomosiapyeri miyu
kaze pukeba oki tu siranami kasikwomito noko no tomari ni amata ywo zo nuru
kusamakura tabi wo kurusimi kwopwi woreba kaya no yamapye ni sawosika naku mo
oki tu nami takaku tatu pi ni apyeriki to miyakwo no pito pa kikitekyemu kamo
amatobu ya kari wo tukapi ni etesi kamo naranomiyakwo ni koto tugeyaramu
aki no nwo wo nipopasu pagwi pa sakyeredomo miru sirusi nasi tabi ni si areba
imo wo omopi i no nerayenu ni aki no nwo ni sawosika nakitu tuma omopikanete
opobune ni makadi sizinuki toki matu to ware pa omopedo tukwi zo penikyeru
ywo wo nagami i no nerayenu ni asipikwino yamabikwo toyome sawosika naku mo
kapyerikite mimu to omopisi wa ga yadwo no akipagwi susuki tirinikyemu kamo
ametuti no kamwi wo kopitutu are matamu paya kimase kimi mataba kurusi mo
kimi wo omopi a ga kwopwimaku pa aratamano tatu tukwi gotoni yokuru pi mo arazi
aki no ywo wo nagami ni ka aramu na zo kokoba i no nerayenu mo pitori nureba ka

sentence.transcription: naga mi ni ka ara mu

block.header: tarasipimye mipune patekyemu matuura no umi imo ga matu beki tukwi pa penitutu
tabi nareba omopitayete mo arituredo ipye ni aru imo si omopiganasi mo
asipikwino yama tobikwoyuru karigane pa miyakwo ni yukaba imo ni apite kone

sumyeroki no topono mikadwo to karakuni ni wataru wa ga se pa ipyebito no ipapimatane ka tadamwi ka mo ayamati sikyemu aki saraba kapyerimasamu to taratineno papa ni mawosite toki mo sugwi tukwi mo penureba kyepu ka komu asu ka mo komu to ipyebito pa matikwopu ramu ni topono kuni imada mo tukazu yamato wo mo topoku sakarite ipa ga ne no araki simane ni yadori suru kimi

sentence.transcription: asu ka mo ko mu to

block.header: ipatanwo ni yadori suru kimi ipyebito no idura to ware wo topaba ikani ipamu
yononaka pa tune kaku nomwi to wakarenuru kimi ni ya motona a ga kwopwiyukamu

ametuti to tomoni moga mo to omopitutu arikyemu monowo pasikyeyasi ipye wo panarete nami no upe yu nadusapikinite aratamano tukwipi mo kipenu karigane mo tugite kinakeba taratineno papa mo tumara mo asatuyu ni mo no suswo piduti yupugwiri ni koromode nurete sakiku si mo aru ramu gotoku ide mitutu matu ramu monowo yononaka no pito no nageki pa apiomopanu kimi ni are ya mo akipagwi no tiraperu nwopye no patuwopana karipo ni pukite kumobanare topoki kunipye no tuyusimono samuki yamabye ni yadori seru ramu

sentence.transcription: tukwi pi mo ki pe nu

block.header: pasikyeyasi tuma mo kwodomo mo takatakani matu ramu kimi ya simagakurenuru
momitiba no tirinamu yama ni yadorinuru kimi wo matu ramu pito no kanasi mo

watatumi no kasikwoki miti wo yasukyeku mo naku nayamikite ima dani mo mo naku yukamu to yuki no ama no potute no urapye wo katayakite yukamu to suru ni ime no goto miti no sworadi ni wakare suru kimi

sentence.transcription: mo na ku yuka mu to
potu te no ura pye wo

block.header: mukasi ywori ipikyeru koto no karakuni no karaku mo koko ni wakare suru kamo
sirakwi pye ka ipye ni ka kapyeru yuki no sima yukamu tadoki mo omopikanetu mo
momopune no paturu tusima no asadiyama sigure no ame ni momitapinikyeri
amazakaru pina ni mo tukwi pa tereredomo imo so topokupa wakarekinikyeru
aki sareba oku tuyusimo ni apezusite miyakwo no yama pa irodukinu ramu
asipikwino yamasita pikaru momitiba no tirinomagapi pa kyepu ni mo aru kamo
takasiki no momiti wo mireba wagimokwo ga matamu to ipisi toki so kinikyeru
takasiki no uramwi no momiti ware yukite kapyerikuru made tirikosu na yume
takasiki no upyekatayama pa kurenawi no yasipo no iro ni narinikyeru kamo
momitiba no tirapu yamabye yu kogu pune no nipopi ni medete idete kinikyeri
takasiki no tamamo nabikasi kogidenamu kimi ga mipune wo itu to ka matamu
tama sikyeru kiywoki nagisa wo sipo miteba akazu ware yuku kapyerusa ni mimu
akiyama no momiti wo kazasi wa ga woreba urasipo mitiku imada akanaku ni
monomopu to pito ni pa miyezi sitabimo no sita yu kwopuru ni tukwi zo penikyeru
ipyedutwo ni kapi wo piripu to okipye ywori yosekuru nami ni koromode nurenu
sipo pwinaba mata mo ware komu iza yukamu oki tu siposawi takaku tatikinu
wa ga swode pa tamoto toporite nurenu tomo kwopwiwasuregapi torazupa yukazi
nubatamano imo ga posu beku aranaku ni wa ga koromode wo nurete ikani semu
momitiba pa ima pa uturopu wagimokwo ga matamu to ipisi toki no peyukeba
aki sareba kwopwisimi imo wo ime ni dani pisasiku mimu wo akenikyeru kamo
pitori nomwi kinuru koromo no pimo tokaba tare ka mo yupamu ipye topokusite
amakumo no tayutapikureba nagatukwi no momiti no yama mo uturopinikyeru
tabi nite mo mo naku paya ko to wagimokwo ga musubisi pimo pa narenikyeru kamo

sentence.transcription: mo na ku paya ko to

block.header: ipyesima pa na ni koso arikyere unapara wo a ga kwopwikituru imo mo aranaku ni
kusamakura tabi ni pisasiku arame ya to imo ni ipisi wo tosi no penuraku
wagimokwo wo yukite paya mimu apadisima kumowi ni miyenu ipyetuku rasi mo

sentence.transcription: kumo wi ni mi ye nu

block.header: nubatamano ywo akasi mo pune pa kogiyukana mitu no pamamatu matikwopwinu ramu
opotomonomitu no tomari ni pune patete tatutanoyama wo itu ka kwoyeikamu
asipikwino yamadi kwoyemu to suru kimi wo kokoro ni motite yasukyeku mo nasi
kimi ga yuku miti no nagate wo kuritatane yakiporobosamu ame no pwi moga mo
wa ga sekwo si kedasi makaraba sirwotapeno swode wo purasane mitutu sinupamu
ko no koro pa kwopwitutu mo aramu tamakusige akete woti ywori subye nakaru besi
tiripidi no kazu ni mo aranu ware yuweni omopiwabu ramu imo ga kanasisa
awoniyosi nara no opoti pa yuki yokyedo ko no yamamiti pa yukiasikarikyeri
urupasi to a ga mopu imo wo omopitutu yukeba ka motona yukiasikaru ramu
kasikwomito norazu arisi wo mikwosidi no tamuke ni tatite imo ga na noritu
omopu weni apu mono naraba simasiku mo imo ga me karete are worame ya mo
akanesasu piru pa monomopi nubatamano yworu pa sugarani ne nomwi si nakayu
wagimokwo ga katami no koromo nakariseba nanimono mote ka inoti tugamasi
topoki yama seki mo kwoyekinu imasarani apu beki yosi no naki ga sabusisa
topoki yama seki mo kwoyekinu imasarani apu beki yosi no naki ga sapisisa
omopazu mo makoto ariemu ya sanuru ywo no ime ni mo imo ga miyezaranaku ni
topoku areba pitopi pitoywo mo omopazute aru ramu mono to omoposimyesu na
pito yori pa imo zo mo asiki kwopwi mo naku aramasi monowo omopasimetutu
omopitutu nureba ka motona nubatamano pitoywo mo otizu ime ni si miyuru
kaku bakari kwopwimu to kanete siramaseba imo woba mizu so aru beku arikyeru
ametuti no kamwi naki mono ni araba koso a ga mopu imo ni apazu sini seme
inoti wo si mataku si araba arikinuno arite noti ni mo apazarame ya mo
inoti wo si mataku si araba arikinuno arite no noti mo apazarame ya mo
apamu pi wo so no pi to sirazu tokoyamwi ni idure no pi made are kwopwi woramu

sentence.transcription: so no pi to sira zu

block.header: tabi to ipeba koto ni so yasuki sukunaku mo imo ni kwopwitutu subye nakyenaku ni
wagimokwo ni kwopuru ni are pa tamakiparu mizikaki inoti mo wosikyeku mo nasi
inoti araba apu koto mo aramu wa ga yuwe ni pada na omopi so inoti dani peba
pito no uuru ta pa uwemasazu imasarani kuni wakare site are pa ikani semu

sentence.transcription: are pa ika ni se mu

block.header: wa ga yadwo no matu no pa mitutu are matamu paya kapyerimase kwopwisinanu twoni
pitokuni pa sumiasi to so ipu sumuyakeku paya kapyerimase kwopwisinanu twoni
pitokuni ni kimi wo imasete itu made ka a ga kwopwi woramu toki no siranaku
ametuti no sokopi no ura ni a ga gotoku kimi ni kwopuramu pito pa sane arazi
sirwotapeno a ga sitagoromo usinapazu motere wa ga sekwo tadani apu madeni
paru no pi no uraganasiki ni okurewite kimi ni kwopwitutu utusikyeme ya mo
apamu pi no katami ni seyo to tawayamye no omopimidarete nupyeru koromo zo
kwaso nasi ni seki tobikwoyuru pototogisu maneku akwo ni mo yamazu kaywopamu

sentence.transcription: mane ku a kwo ni mo

block.header: urupasi to a ga mopu imo wo yamakapa wo naka ni pyenarite yasukyeku mo nasi
mukapiwite pitopi mo otizu misikadomo itopanu imo wo tukwi wataru made
a ga mwi koso sekiyama kwoyete koko ni arame kokoro pa imo ni yorinisi monowo
sasutakeno opomiyapito pa ima mo ka mo pito naburi nomwi konomitaru ramu
sasutakeno opomiyapito pa ima sape ya pitonaburi nomwi konomitaru ramu
tatikapyeri nakedomo are pa sirusi nami omopiwaburete nuru ywo si zo opoki

sentence.transcription: nuru ywo si zo opo ki

block.header: sanuru ywo pa opoku aredomo monomopazu yasuku nuru ywo pa sane naki monowo
yononaka no tune no kotowari kakusama ni narikinikye rasi suwesi tane kara
wagimokwo ni apusakayama wo kwoyete kite nakitutu woredo apu yosi mo nasi
tabi to ipeba koto ni so yasuki subye mo naku kurusiki tabi mo koto ni masame ya mo

sentence.transcription: koto ni masa me ya mo

block.header: yamakapa wo naka ni pyenarite topoku tomo kokoro wo tikaku omopose wagimo
maswokagami kakete sinupye to maturidasu katami no mono wo pito ni simyesu na
urupasi to omopi si omopaba sitabimo ni yupituke motite yamazu sinwopase
tamasipi pa asita yupubye ni tamapuredo a ga mune itasi kwopwi no sigeki ni
ko no koro pa kimi wo omopu to subye mo naki kwopwi nomwi situtu ne nomwi si zo naku
nubatamano yworu misi kimi wo akuru asita apazu ma nisite ima zo kuyasiki
adimanwo ni yadoreru kimi ga kapyerikomu toki no mukape wo itu to ka matamu
miyapito no yasui mo nezute kyepu kyepu to matu ramu monowo miyenu kimi kamo
kapyerikyeru pito kitareri to ipisikaba potopoto siniki kimi ka to omopite
kimi ga muta yukamasi monowo onazi koto okurete woredo yoki koto mo nasi

sentence.transcription: yo ki koto mo na si

block.header: wa ga sekwo ga kapyerikimasamu toki no tame inoti nokosamu wasuretamapu na
aratamano tosinowo nagaku apazaredo kyesiki kokoro wo a ga mopanaku ni
kyepu mo ka mo miyakwo n ariseba mimaku pori nisi no mimaya no two ni tateramasi

sentence.transcription: nisi no mi ma ya no

block.header: kinopu kyepu kimi ni apazute suru subye no tadwoki wo sirani ne nomwi si zo naku
sirwotapeno a ga koromode wo torimotite ipapye wa ga sekwo tadani apu madeni
wa ga yadwo no panatatibana pa itadurani tiri ka suguramu miru pito nasi ni

sentence.transcription: mi ru pito na si ni

block.header: kwopwi sinaba kwopwi mo sine to ya pototogisu monomopu toki ni kinaki toyomuru
tabi nisite monomopu toki ni pototogisu motona na naki so a ga kwopwi masaru
amagomori monomopu toki ni pototogisu wa ga sumu satwo ni kinaki toyomosu
tabi nisite imo ni kwopureba pototogisu wa ga sumu satwo ni ko ywo nakiwataru
kokoro naki tori ni so arikyeru pototogisu monomopu toki ni naku beki mono ka
pototogisu apida simasi okye na ga nakeba a ga mopu kokoro ita mo subye nasi
